title: Home From The Wars
content:
A tattered soldier, gone the glow and gloss,
            With wounds half healed, and sorely trembling knee,
        Homeward I come, to claim no victory-cross:
            I only faced the foe, and did not flee.
meaning:
George MacDonald's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Home From The Wars"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
